justification: All 7 ACs implemented and tested. Collect-all errors pattern confirmed (accumulator, no early return). AC5 conditional required for express only (=== undefined check). AC6 conditional forbidden for standard (!== undefined catches both booleans) — distinct from AC5. Error shape is { field, code } throughout. AC7 tested with both 2-error and 3-error multi-failure requests. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 7 ACs explicitly. No external validation library used.

observations.text: AC5 and AC6 are clearly distinct: AC5 checks undefined on express, AC6 checks !== undefined on standard — correct conditional logic
AC7 covered with two separate multi-error tests (2-error and 3-error combos), exceeding minimum requirement
Boundary conditions well-handled: weight=0, weight=1000, saturday_delivery=false, whitespace-only recipient_name
15 tests across all 7 ACs with no external dependencies
AC6 correctly treats saturday_delivery: false as 'present' for standard shipments — a subtle edge case handled correctly
